fields.title: DRY: Extract makeLegacyService helper for 8 identical service wrappers
fields.description: beads, commit, editor, exa, status, terminal-prompt, worked-for, skill-marker, agent all follow the exact same pattern: Layer.effect + Effect.sync wrapper around a legacy init function. Extract a generic factory: makeLegacyServiceLayer(name, initFn, deps). This eliminates ~200 lines of boilerplate.
fields.close_reason: Extracted legacyPiLayer and legacyBridgedLayer factories into services/legacy.ts. Converted all 9 legacy wrapper services to use them, reducing each from ~25 lines to ~13 lines.
